hard_rules: no camelCase top-level fns (only PascalCase factories); logic on types/in units; Flow over suspend; sealed CLASS not interface; no public/top-level/companion mutable var; no secondary ctor/lateinit/!!; sealed errors; typed over Map<String,JsonElement>/Any?
